description:
Executes a Common Workflow Language (CWL) workflow or CommandLineTool.

The CWL document can be provided as an inline YAML/JSON string or as a URL pointing to a remote CWL file. The workflow is validated before execution. Inputs are passed as a flat key-value mapping corresponding to the CWL input parameters.

On the backend, validated CWL is executed through Calrissian on Kubernetes. Outputs are collected and exposed as standard openEO job results.

This is an MVP process. Only CWL v1.0–1.2 CommandLineTool and simple single-step Workflow documents are supported. Nested workflows, ScatterFeatureRequirements, and advanced CWL features are not guaranteed to work.

parameters.name: cwl
parameters.description: The CWL document to execute. Either an inline CWL string (YAML or JSON) or a URL pointing to a remote `.cwl` file (must be reachable from the backend).

schema.title: Inline CWL
schema.description: A CWL document provided as an inline YAML or JSON string.

schema.title: Remote CWL URL
schema.description: A URL pointing to a CWL file.

parameters.name: inputs
parameters.description: A flat key-value mapping of CWL input parameter names to their values. Keys must match the input IDs declared in the CWL document. Values can be strings, numbers, booleans, or objects (e.g. File references with `class: File` and `path` or `location`).

parameters.name: options
parameters.description:
Optional execution flags.

- `validate_only` (boolean, default `false`): If `true`, the CWL document is validated but not executed. The process returns immediately after validation.
- `max_ram` (string, optional): Maximum RAM for concurrent CWL steps, e.g. `"8G"`. Defaults to backend configuration.
- `max_cores` (integer, optional): Maximum CPU cores for concurrent CWL steps. Defaults to backend configuration.

validate_only.description: If true, validate the CWL document without executing it.

max_ram.description: Maximum RAM for concurrent CWL steps (e.g. '8G').

max_cores.description: Maximum CPU cores for concurrent CWL steps.

returns.description: The CWL workflow output files, exposed as openEO job results. For `validate_only` mode, returns a validation status object.

schema.description: Validation result when validate_only is true.

CwlInvalidDocument.message: The provided CWL document is not valid.

CwlInputMismatch.message: The provided inputs do not match the CWL document's declared input parameters.

examples.title: Run a simple CWL CommandLineTool from URL
Validate a CWL document without running it
